org.apache.dubbo.registry.nacos

类 NacosServiceName

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.registry.nacos.NacosServiceName

  • public class NacosServiceName
extends Object
    The service name of Nacos
    从以下版本开始:
    2.7.3
